global.description: The ad features a vibrant design with abstract shapes and clear text elements promoting a streaming service.
global.main_message: Promoting the new season of FluxStream with a call to action to watch now.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract geometric shapes in soft colors, creating a visually engaging background.

elements.label: central graphic
elements.description: A prominent central graphic that features a large, colorful square with rounded edges.

elements.label: overlapping shape
elements.description: An overlapping circular shape that adds depth and interest to the central graphic.

elements.label: additional shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape that complements the main graphic, positioned slightly off-center.

elements.label: colorful circle
elements.description: A colorful circular element that enhances the visual appeal of the ad.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: The logo 'FluxStream' displayed prominently at the top in bold, modern typography.

elements.label: season announcement
elements.description: Text announcing 'new season drops' in a clear, friendly font, positioned centrally.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A button labeled 'Watch now' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: subscription price
elements.description: The price '€9.99' displayed in a simple, easy-to-read format at the bottom.

elements.label: main title
elements.description: The headline 'FluxStream' in large, bold letters, capturing immediate attention.

elements.label: additional info
elements.description: Text providing additional information about the service, positioned below the headline.
elements.text_content: new season drops Start free today

elements.label: watch now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now', designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: price tag
elements.description: A small price tag displaying '€9.99', indicating the cost of the service.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main graphic is central, and the CTA is at the bottom.
